label: Document Loader
description: Fetch a document from a URL (or pass through inline input). Optional parseMode strips HTML or pretty-prints JSON.

settings.name: url
settings.label: URL
settings.description: Document URL. If unset and sourceType=url, falls back to upstream input string.

settings.name: parseMode
settings.label: Parse mode
settings.description: auto: strip HTML if response looks like HTML; text: always strip HTML; html: keep raw; json: keep stringified.

ai.shortDescription: Fetch document content from a URL.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to load a web page, JSON document, or plaintext file before passing it to embedding/LLM nodes.
ai.examplePrompt: load https://example.com/release-notes.html and strip HTML for the LLM
ai.promptHints: Use parseMode=text to clean HTML for LLM consumption. Reference content via {{steps.<id>.result.content}}.
